title: Bitter Crisp Peruvian Pork Stir-fry
description: A hearty and flavorful dish featuring hangover-curing properties from the bitter greens mixed with tender pork shoulder steaks in a savory stir-fry sauce.

ingredients.name: Mixed Bitter Greens
ingredients.notes: Includes bitter greens like escarole, endive, and radicchio

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic, scallions, and paprika; stir-fry for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add mixed bitter greens and pork to the pan. Stir well to coat ingredients evenly with the spices and sauce.
Cook for another 5-7 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender and meat is cooked through but still slightly pink in the center (internal temperature should be at least 145°F/63°C).
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
